title: Firefly Dashboard
author: Nottheend <info@nottheend.info>
tagline: A cleaner Firefly-III interface with Cloudron SSO

FIREFLY_BASE_URL.title: Firefly-III URL
FIREFLY_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your Firefly-III instance, e.g. https://firefly.yourdomain.com

FIREFLY_TOKEN.title: Firefly-III API Token
FIREFLY_TOKEN.description: Personal Access Token from Firefly: Profile → OAuth → Personal Access Tokens

SESSION_SECRET.title: Session Secret
SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
